import re, unicodedata, math, difflib

# Define normalization function for Arabic
ARABIC_DIACRITICS = re.compile("[\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u065F\u06D6-\u06ED]")
TATWEEL = "\u0640"

def normalize_arabic(text):
    if text is None:
        return ""
    # Remove diacritics
    text = ARABIC_DIACRITICS.sub("", text)
    # Remove tatweel
    text = text.replace(TATWEEL, "")
    # Normalize Hamza forms: various alef forms to bare alif
    # Convert different alef forms to ا
    text = re.sub("[\u0622\u0623\u0625\u0671]", "ا", text)
    # Waw with hamza remains?
    # Normalize ya forms
    text = text.replace("ى", "ي")
    # Normalize ta marbuta to ha? we can keep it as ta marbuta; better unify to ه?
    text = text.replace("ة", "ه")
    # Remove punctuation including shadda sign not a diacritic? Already removed. Also punctuation marks
    text = re.sub(r"[^\w\s\u0600-\u06FF]", " ", text)
    # Collapse whitespace
    text = re.sub(r"\s+", " ", text).strip()
    # Lowercase
    # Arabic doesn't have case, but just to unify Latin characters if any.
    return text

def lcs_length(a, b):
    # For sequences of characters
    # dynamic programming
    n, m = len(a), len(b)
    dp = [0]*(m+1)
    for i in range(1, n+1):
        prev = 0
        ai = a[i-1]
        for j in range(1, m+1):
            tmp = dp[j]
            if ai == b[j-1]:
                dp[j] = prev + 1
            else:
                dp[j] = max(dp[j], dp[j-1])
            prev = tmp
    return dp[m]

def similarity_score(a, b):
    # Use normalized strings
    na = normalize_arabic(a)
    nb = normalize_arabic(b)
    if not na or not nb:
        return 0.0
    # LCS normalized by max length
    lcs = lcs_length(na, nb)
    lcs_ratio = lcs / max(len(na), len(nb))
    # Token F1 (character-level tokens? Use words)
    tokens_a = na.split()
    tokens_b = nb.split()
    set_a = set(tokens_a)
    set_b = set(tokens_b)
    inter = len(set_a & set_b)
    prec = inter / len(set_a) if set_a else 0.0
    rec = inter / len(set_b) if set_b else 0.0
    if prec + rec > 0:
        f1 = 2 * prec * rec / (prec + rec)
    else:
        f1 = 0.0
    # Combine
    score = 0.6*lcs_ratio + 0.4*f1
    return score, {"lcs_ratio": lcs_ratio, "f1": f1, "na": na, "nb": nb}

# Test normalization
normalize_arabic(original_span)[:200], similarity_score("فَأَمَّا الَّذِينَ ظَلَمُوا", "فاما الذين ظلموا")

# Update normalization to include \u0670 removal
ARABIC_DIACRITICS = re.compile("[\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u065F\u06D6-\u06ED\u0670]")

def normalize_arabic(text):
    if text is None:
        return ""
    text = ARABIC_DIACRITICS.sub("", text)
    text = text.replace(TATWEEL, "")
    text = re.sub("[\u0622\u0623\u0625\u0671]", "ا", text)
    text = text.replace("ى", "ي")
    text = text.replace("ة", "ه")
    text = re.sub(r"[^\w\s\u0600-\u06FF]", " ", text)
    text = re.sub(r"\s+", " ", text).strip()
    return text
